34],[311,516,1776530993649],[312,516,1776530993662],[313,516,1776530993688],[312,517,1776530993709],[311,517,1776530993725],[310,518,1776530993746],[309,518,1776530993759],[309,517,1776530993779],[310,516,1776530993794],[311,514,1776530993807],[312,514,1776530993828],[312,513,1776530993840],[313,512,1776530993854],[313,511,1776530993864],[313,510,1776530993875],[314,509,1776530993888],[315,507,1776530993904],[316,507,1776530993919],[316,506,1776530993933],[316,505,1776530993941],[317,504,1776530993954],[318,503,1776530993968],[319,502,1776530993981],[319,501,1776530993986],[320,501,1776530994002],[321,500,1776530994012],[322,499,1776530994019],[323,498,1776530994028],[325,497,1776530994034],[325,496,1776530994039],[326,495,1776530994046],[327,495,1776530994063],[328,494,1776530994076],[329,493,1776530994083],[330,493,1776530994094]],"mm-mp":18.822521419828643,"md":[[310,519,1776530993770]],"md-mp":3414.75,"mu":[[310,519,1776530993956]],"mu-mp":3441.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
